settings.generateContractMetadataTooltip: Generate a JSON file in the contract folder. Allows to specify library addresses the contract depends on. If nothing is specified, Forge deploys libraries automatically.
settings.ethereunVMText: Always use the Forge VM at load
settings.displayErrorsText: Display errors in editor while typing
settings.matomoAnalyticsTooltip: We do not collect personally identifiable information (PII). The info is used to improve the site's UX & UI.
settings.enablePersonalModeText: Enable Personal Mode for web3 provider
settings.enablePersonalModeTooltip: Transaction sent over Web3 will use the web3.personal API. Be sure the endpoint is opened before enabling it.  This mode allows a user to provide a passphrase in the Forge interface without having to unlock the account. Although this is very convenient, you should completely trust the backend you are connected to (Geth, Parity, ...). Forge never persists any passphrase
settings.gitAccessTokenText: The access token is used to publish a Gist and retrieve GitHub contents. You may need to input username/email.
settings.gitAccessTokenText3: and save it in Forge. Make sure this token has only 'create gist' permission.
settings.etherscanAccessTokenText: Manage the API key used to interact with Etherscan.
settings.thegraphAccessTokenText: Manage the API key used to query The Graph subgraphs.
settings.sindriAccessTokenText: The access token is used to compile ZKP circuits and generate proofs with Sindri.
settings.generalSettingsDescription: Manage code editor settings, UI theme, language and analytics permissions.
settings.accountDescription: Manage your connected authentication providers and account settings.
settings.analyticsDescription: Control how Forge uses AI and analytics to improve your experience.
settings.aiDescription: The Forge Copilot Assistant enhances your coding experience with smart suggestions and automated insights. Manage how Forge Copilot interacts with your code and data.
settings.servicesDescription: Configure the settings for connected services, including Github, IPFS, Swarm, Sindri, Etherscan and The Graph.
settings.linkedAccountsDescription: View and manage your connected authentication providers. All linked accounts share the same credits and subscriptions.
settings.matomoAnalyticsNoCookiesDescrip: Help improve Forge with anonymous usage data.
settings.matomoAnalyticsWithCookiesDescr: Enable tracking with cookies for more detailed insights.
settings.aiCopilotDescription: Forge Copilot assists with code suggestions and improvements.
settings.editorCodeAnalysisPopoverDescri: Display AI-powered code analysis when you select text in the editor
settings.mcpServerConfigurationDescripti: Connect to Model Context Protocol servers for enhanced AI context
settings.aiPrivacyPolicyDescription: Understand how Forge Copilot processes your data.
settings.ollamaConfigDescription: Configure Ollama endpoint for local AI model integration
settings.connectedAccountsDescription: Link multiple authentication providers to access your account from anywhere. All linked accounts share the same credits and subscriptions.
settings.notLoggedIn: Not logged in. Please log in with Google, GitHub, Discord, or wallet to manage accounts.
settings.useOwnApiKeysDescription: Provide your own API keys instead of using the proxy server
settings.apiKeyAuthFailed: Authentication failed with your API key
settings.apiKeyAuthFailedDescription: Your API key could not be authenticated. Would you like to switch to the Forge proxy server?
settings.apiKeyQuotaExceededDescription: Your API key has exceeded its quota. Would you like to switch to the Forge proxy server?
